description: Contiguous Gold substage windows for a selected well and TD stage.
sql: SELECT * FROM ( WITH win AS ( SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM CAST(to_timestamp(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM CAST('2024-06-01 08:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP)) + (((:stage_num) - 1) * 1800)) AS TIMESTAMP)) AS s0, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM CAST(to_timestamp(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM CAST('2024-06-01 08:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP)) + (((:stage_num) - 1) * 1800 + 1200)) AS TIMESTAMP)) AS s1 ), segs AS ( SELECT 'pad' AS substage_label, 0.0 AS fa, 0.3 AS fb, '#6F64C7' AS color UNION ALL SELECT 'prop' AS substage_label, 0.3 AS fa, 0.75 AS fb, '#2FA8A1' AS color UNION ALL SELECT 'flush' AS substage_label, 0.75 AS fa, 1.0 AS fb, '#C77F64' AS color ) SELECT s.substage_label, CAST(to_timestamp(w.s0 + s.fa * (w.s1 - w.s0)) AS TIMESTAMP) AS start_ts, CAST(to_timestamp(w.s0 + s.fb * (w.s1 - w.s0)) AS TIMESTAMP) AS end_ts, s.color, CAST((s.fb - s.fa) * 200 AS INTEGER) AS sample_count FROM win w CROSS JOIN segs s ) q
